picks.quote: I had a feeling bro like I went to weigh in and I saw Kyle Snyder working on the morning just like bro this dude was going to win tonight.
I'm going for Armen, bro, but because of the weight and if Kobe's able to hydrate and whatnot... I could see Kobe sweeping it through and actually getting the job done
Winner of this fight is fighting for that middleweight strap... the Nightmare is here to steal the damn show.
